Module 6:
JV Launch, Part 1
!
Executive Summary
It’s time to talk about Joint Venture (JV) launches, a popular topic among
PLF Owners. Now one thing to note is that these can get pretty complex,
but they can be very beneficial to your business too.
At its most basic, a JV partner of yours will mail their list to look at your
PLC, buy your product, and you’ll give them a portion of the sales
(commission). It’s a way to get yourself in front of a lot of people
These launches can be very lucrative. I’ve personally made tens of millions
in sales through these types of launches. Yes, it sounds awesome, but
there are a lot of potential issues.
As you know, PLF is all about a long-term success game plan. This is not
about getting rich quick. You must first build out your Internal Launch and
make sure it works - you need your metrics.
So for example, you have 3 pieces of PLC, and then a Sales Video. If you
have a JV partner, they would mail into a squeeze page and the people that
opt in would receive your first piece of PLC.
!
1	© 2014 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
GROUPINSIDERS.COM EXCLUSIVE

-- 1 of 3 --

If they have a 10,000 person list and send 1,000 visitors to your squeeze
page, and that converts at 50%, you would have 500 people going through
your launch.
Now imagine if you had 5 of these partners that each had 10,000 person
lists! As you can see, this is the fastest way to build your list.
If they buy from you then you give your partners commission.
It’s important to do that Internal Launch first - don’t test a launch on your
partners list. If you make a mistake you may burn your relationship with
your partner.
This is not a short-term game - I have partners that have been promoting
me since 2008 when I first released Product Launch Formula. You have to
get these partners on board and that’s what we’re going to talk about now.
So, how do you find partners? Google is a great place to start. You
probably already know who your competitors (future partners) are.
Who are the people that are influencers or big dogs in your market? Track
who these people are and join their lists. Join their affiliate program - watch
what they send out to their affiliates and main lists.
Track who promotes who and understand what the JV landscape is like in
your market. I’m a big fan of live events, I like this strategy and it’s a great
way to meet people.
!
2	© 2014 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
GROUPINSIDERS.COM EXCLUSIVE

-- 2 of 3 --

You can also go to Clickbank.com and search on their marketplace - you
can see what products are selling. Great launches can be done with just 5
very committed partners.
If you get the right partners others will follow. It’s important to note that
getting them on board is difficult - entrepreneurs are always busy. You have
to break through that and build a relationship with them.
It’s the same in all businesses, you have to add value to them if you want to
build the relationship. You never want to ask someone to mail for you
before you build a relationship for them.
This strategy rarely works and it will annoy the person. Even if they do work
with you, they won’t full invest their efforts into the launch the way someone
you know well would.
!
